issues.detail: Instructions are not fully explicit, lacking context for some steps.
Examples cover only happy paths, missing error handling and edge cases.
Skill is vendor-locked to Replicate, not platform-agnostic.

scenarios.name: Non-blocking SDXL with webhook
scenarios.rationale: Treatment correctly uses replicate.predictions.create with webhook and webhook_events_filter=['completed'] to avoid polling; baseline polls in a loop instead.

scenarios.name: Package and deploy a custom HF model
scenarios.rationale: Treatment uses Cog with cog.yaml, a BasePredictor subclass, and cog push r8.im/<user>/<model>; baseline suggests generic Docker/HF Spaces without Cog.
